title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: Find more about who Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory is. Explore our culture.
text:
Who we are
Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) is known for groundbreaking research in nuclear science, high performance-computing, biotechnology and more. Our mission-driven atmosphere allows us to focus on some of the world's most complex and pressing problems, offering innovative solutions that benefit all. We are proud to be an industry leader in science, technology, engineering, and so much more.
Explore our culture
We strive every day to create a culture that is inclusive, collaborative, and enriching for all our employees. We understand that choosing your next career is about more than finding a job that utilizes your talent—it's about finding a workplace that builds an environment where you can thrive, feel welcome, and grow.
Do you want to find employees with similar interests? Look no further. Are you looking for work-life balance? We have you covered. When you work with us, you're in the right place.
Building an Inclusive Campus
Science thrives on innovation, and the key to our innovative success is our foundation of team science and big ideas, allowing people to use their individual experiences to bring new insights and solutions to the table. When you work here, you belong.
Explore Inclusion at LLNL
Discover what it's like to work here
Ready to picture yourself working at LLNL? Life on our campus is all about balance. We believe our employees are equipped to do their best work when they’re supported both professionally and personally. The Lab offers flexibility, wellness opportunities, and on-site activities and events to help employees connect and recharge when they’re not innovating the next big idea in service of the nation.
